title: Crispy French Tarte
description: A simple yet elegant dessert featuring a crispy crust and a vanilla-infused filling.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, and crumble.
Add the cold butter and use a pastry blender or your fingers to work it into the dry ingredients until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Press the mixture into a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
Bake the crust for 20-22 minutes, or until golden brown.
In a separate bowl, whisk together egg, heavy cream, and vanilla extract.
Pour the filling into the baked crust and smooth the top.
Return the tart to the oven and bake for an additional 25-30 minutes, or until the filling is set.
Remove from the oven and let cool to room temperature before serving.
